title: Middle Class Tax Relief Act
summary: Reduces tax burdens for middle income workers and small businesses.

title: Community Health Access Act
summary: Expands clinic funding and prescription coverage.

title: Teacher Workforce Support Act
summary: Supports teacher hiring, skills training, and career education.

title: Clean Grid Investment Act
summary: Funds clean energy transmission and emissions reduction projects.

title: Allied Defense Readiness Act
summary: Improves force readiness, military planning, and alliance operations.

title: Border Staffing Modernization Act
summary: Adds border personnel, immigration screening systems, and asylum case resources.

title: Violent Crime Data Improvement Act
summary: Improves crime reporting, policing grants, and public safety coordination.

title: Rail and Broadband Buildout Act
summary: Expands passenger rail, broadband deployment, and port modernization.

title: Senate Cloture Motion Vehicle
summary: Placeholder vehicle for cloture motion handling.

title: House Motion to Recommit Vehicle
summary: Placeholder vehicle for House recommit motion handling.

title: Commemorative Heritage Week Act
summary: Designates a commemorative week for civic reflection.

title: Ceremonial Honor Resolution Act
summary: Provides a ceremonial recognition with limited policy content.
